prestazioni: Engine: B230FT (2.3L SOHC 8V turbocharged inline-4) – Full forged internals including Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Upgraded ARP head studs and main studs for 30+ psi boost capability.

Turbocharger: Garrett GT3582R with a .82 A/R turbine housing and 60mm compressor wheel, paired with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe and a Tial 44mm external wastegate. Intercooler: GReddy Type-S front-mount intercooler with a 2.5-inch core and custom aluminum piping by IPD Motorsport.

Fuel System: Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors, and a custom ECU tune via Megasquirt MS3Pro PNP with launch control, flex-fuel compatibility, and individual cylinder trimming. Exhaust: 3-inch stainless steel straight-pipe system with a custom 5-inch oval rear muffler by Stainless Works, featuring a 4-2-1 merge collector.
estetica: Body Kit: Rare Volvo 740-specific 'R-Sport' widebody conversion kit by Heico Sportiv (OEM+ style, no aftermarket replicas), including front and rear fender flares, side skirts, and a custom front splitter with integrated tow hooks. Paint: PPG 'Volvo Dark Grey Metallic' (original 1988 factory color) with a 3-stage mirror-polished clear coat.

Wheels: 17x9 ET15 BBS RS-GT II (gold centers) wrapped in 245/40/17 Toyo R888R semi-slick tires. Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track coilovers with 8kg/mm front springs and 7kg/mm rear springs, adjustable camber plates by SPC Performance, and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension (full kit).

Interior: Recaro SRD Evo II seats (Volvo-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in black Alcantara with red stitching, Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, quick-release hub), and a custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK (8-point, TIG-welded, bolt-in design with harness bar). Gauges: Defi Advance BF series (boost, oil pressure, wideband AFR) mounted in a custom A-pillar pod by Auto Meter.
